snippet.title: THE CARER | OFFICIAL TRAILER | UZOR ARUKWE | TENIOLA ALADESE | ESO DIKE | OMOWUNMI DADA
snippet.description:
A wealthy and fiercely independent businesswoman, whose life is shattered by a devastating illness and painful betrayal, has driven away every caregiver who has ever crossed her path. When Frank, a struggling father desperate to rebuild his life, lands the job against all odds, he steps into a world of impossible demands and emotional scars.

But with a shocking lie hanging over Frank's head and the past refusing to stay buried, their  connection is pushed to its limits. THE CARER is a story of love, healing, sacrifice, and second chances.

With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.

snippet.description:
Odaju is a heartfelt declaration of confidence in God's unfailing faithfulness, featuring the incredible EmmaOMG.

Inspired by the words of Jesus in Matthew 6:25–34, this song reminds us of a timeless truth: if God faithfully feeds the birds of the air and clothes the flowers of the field with beauty, how much more will He take care of His children.

In a world filled with uncertainty, Odaju is a call to rest, trust, and believe that God never abandons those who belong to Him. His provision is sure, His promises stand, and His love never fails.

May this song strengthen your faith, calm your fears, and remind you that your Father knows exactly what you need.

"Look at the birds of the air... Are you not much more valuable than they?" — Matthew 6:26

In a world where magic is everything, Asta and Yuno are both found abandoned at a church on the same day. While Yuno is gifted with exceptional magical powers, Asta is the only one in this world without any. At the age of fifteen, both receive grimoires, magic books that amplify their holder’s magic. Asta’s is a rare Grimoire of Anti-Magic that negates and repels his opponent’s spells. Being opposite but good rivals, Yuno and Asta are ready for the hardest of challenges to achieve their common dream: to be the Wizard King. Giving up is never an option!

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official Countdown Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.
